response.justification: While Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and 30+ years of experience, there are critical disqualifying gaps: no evidence of native-level Japanese (an explicit requirement), zero demonstrated experience with embedded networking security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, MAC authentication), no background in LAN-switch products or firmware development, and current specialization (web/cloud/AI infrastructure) is orthogonal to the role's domain. His C experience dates to 2000-2001, and recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js rather than systems programming.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience spanning 30+ years with proven ability to master multiple languages and technical domains
Strong testing and code quality mindset (TDD, refactoring focus) would benefit embedded systems development
Historical C/C++ experience at National Instruments and systems programming in DLang demonstrate capability with low-level code
concerns: No mention of native-level Japanese language proficiency, which is explicitly required for this role
Zero demonstrated experience with security technologies required: MACsec, 802.1X, MAC authentication, device attack detection, or encryption systems
Career has specialized in web, mobile, cloud, and AI infrastructure; lacks embedded networking, firmware, network switch products, or LAN hardware domain knowledge

key_factors.factor: Embedded networking security domain expertise gap
